text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the end of a successful summer
camp with Tokai Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ouch, ouch, ouch... Since it's the last day, I
figured I could go all out. But now my muscles are
super sore.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Still, that just means I pushed myself to my limit,
right?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Japan Cup. I gotta surpass my
current limits if I'm gonna win it.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'll show Prez and my fans just how much I've
grown!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Oof, oof, oof. Ugh, and that was supposed to
be such a cool speech, too!
